lines.speaker: Monkey boy
lines.text: Oh wow you can understand me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I happen to be proficient in many languages... anyway, what are you doing here in Varrock?

lines.speaker: Monkey boy
lines.text: Well my uncle Daga's shop has been a bit slow recently, and we just got some new stock in so I decided to help and advertise a bit.

lines.speaker: Monkey boy
lines.text: Oh just more scimitars, we got a few of there weird red ones too... dra-something...

lines.speaker: Monkey boy
lines.text: Yeah that's the one, are they valuable?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... no... not really... I'll be right back...

lines.speaker: Monkey boy
lines.text: Oh wow you can understand me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I happen to be proficient in many languages... anyway, what are you doing here in Varrock?

lines.speaker: Monkey boy
lines.text: Oh you bought one of those dra-whatever things, I was told they're not much good.

lines.speaker: Monkey boy
lines.text: Well I'll be a monkey's nephew, I'm such a noob!
